meta.title: Taha Armanç Bingöl | Full-Stack Developer
meta.description: Computer Engineering student, Full-Stack developer and DevOps enthusiast. Portfolio showcasing innovative solutions built with modern web technologies.

hero.name: Taha Armanç Bingöl
hero.title: Full-Stack Developer & DevOps Enthusiast
hero.subtitle: I'm a 2nd year Computer Engineering student at Bitlis Eren University. An aspiring engineer passionate about modern web technologies, mobile development, and cloud infrastructure.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Solutions I've built for real-world problems

items.title: PMS - Vehicle Rental Management System
items.problem: Car rental companies were struggling with complex and time-consuming processes in customer tracking, fleet management, and billing.
items.solution: Developed a comprehensive Property Management System using C# and .NET. Integrated vehicle inventory, customer CRM, automated billing, and reporting modules.
items.result: Reduced operational complexity in rental processes by 40%. Improved vehicle utilization efficiency with real-time fleet tracking.

items.title: BEUShareBox - Social Sharing Platform
items.problem: University students lacked a dedicated platform for sharing, filtering, and searching for needed products.
items.solution: Built a dynamic SPA using Vanilla JavaScript with localStorage persistence, real-time search, and filtering capabilities.
items.result: Created a performant SPA with zero dependencies. Gained deep expertise in DOM manipulation and state management.

items.title: Teknofest - Autonomous Vehicle Project
items.problem: Complex engineering challenges in vehicle navigation, obstacle detection, and route optimization needed to be solved for the autonomous driving competition.
items.solution: Served as a software developer in the team. Worked on sensor data processing, path planning algorithms, and real-time decision-making systems.
items.result: Gained critical technical experience as a team in Teknofest competition. Acquired practical skills in embedded systems and real-time data processing.

items.title: NestJS Catalog API
items.problem: A RESTful API infrastructure was needed for product catalog management. Authentication, authorization, and data validation were critical requirements.
items.solution: Developed a modular API with NestJS framework. Integrated JWT-based authentication, role-based authorization, DTO validation, and Swagger documentation.
items.result: Built a professional-grade backend API. Gained hands-on experience with Guard, Interceptor, and Pipe patterns.

items.title: MAUI Discount Tracker App
items.problem: Users needed a mobile app to track discounts from their favorite brands and receive notifications.
items.solution: Developed a cross-platform mobile app with .NET MAUI. Implemented brand/category-based push notification system, user preference management, and responsive UI.
items.result: Created a single-codebase app running on both Android and iOS. Gained experience in MVVM pattern and data binding.

items.title: Software Developer
items.description: Full-stack web and mobile application development projects. Developed vehicle rental management system (PMS), social sharing platform, and RESTful APIs.

items.title: Team Member - Software Developer
items.description: Took an active role in the software development team within the autonomous driving competition. Worked on sensor integration and route planning algorithms.
2nd year Computer Engineering student. Currently studying Data Structures, Algorithms, Web-Based Programming, Mobile App Development, and Database Management.
